dict.string: Sales Coach uses your location to pin leads on the map and remind you when you're near a customer.
Sales Coach sends reminders when you're near a pinned lead location, even when the app is in the background.
Sales Coach uses Siri to start practice scenarios, open team sales log, and log sales with your company team.
Sales Coach uses the camera to scan business cards and add contacts to your CRM.
Sales Coach uses your photo library to import business card images for contact scanning.
